prestazioni: SR20DET (black top, 7,000 RPM redline) forced induction upgrade with Garrett GT35R turbo (84mm compressor, .82 A/R turbine housing) paired with Tomei 260° cams (1.2mm lift, 248° duration) and HKS 272° adjustable cam gears for optimized spool and top-end power

Custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system by Fujitsubo Legalis R (titanium 70mm piping, 304 stainless muffler) with GReddy Revolution RS front pipe (equal-length 4-2-1 design) and Tomei 76mm titanium downpipe for reduced backpressure and weight savings

Nismo 550cc/min high-impedance fuel injectors with Walbro 255LPH in-tank fuel pump, AEM 320LPH external pump, and Sard 1,000cc top-feed fuel rail, controlled via Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel sensor and dual-map switching for E85 compatibility
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (FRP construction, 30mm extended fenders, custom carbon fiber overfenders) with Rocket Bunny V3 rear bumper (dual diffuser, integrated tow hook) and custom front splitter by C-West (3D carbon fiber, 50mm adjustable canards)

Ohlins DFV Road & Track coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 30-way rebound, 20mm ride height adjustment) with Cusco front strut bar (22mm hollow aluminum) and Nismo 4-point rear strut brace (stainless steel, 3-point triangulated design) for chassis rigidity

Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +15 front and 18x10.5 +25 rear wheels (5x114.3, 73.1mm hubcentric) wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/40/18 and 275/35/18 tires, paired with Project Mu B-Spec 4-pot front calipers (32mm pistons) and 2-pot rear calipers (28mm pistons) with DBA 5000 Series rotors (330mm front, 300mm rear, slotted)
